register_success: Account created. Check your email to activate it
register_success_direct: Account created. You can sign in now
setup_desc: Set up your admin account to get started.
passkey_unsupported: This browser or environment does not support passkeys.
password_reset_request_desc: Enter the email address for your account and we will send a password reset link to that inbox.
password_reset_request_hint: After submitting, check your inbox for a password reset email. If it does not arrive, check spam or try again later.
password_reset_request_sent: Password reset request submitted. Check your inbox.
reset_password_success_login: Password reset complete. Sign in with your new password.
activation_pending_desc_email: We already sent an activation link to {{email}}.
activation_pending_desc_identifier: This account is still waiting for activation. You can resend the activation email.
activation_pending_hint: If you have not received the email, check your spam folder first. If it is still missing, resend the activation email.
activation_confirmed: Account activated. Sign in to continue.
mfa_required_desc: Complete one of the available second-factor checks to finish signing in.
mfa_flow_expired: This challenge has expired. Return to sign in and try again.
mfa_email_code_hint: Send an 8-digit code to your verified email address.
mfa_email_code_sent_remaining: Email code sent. It expires in {{seconds}}s.
external_auth_login_failed_desc: The identity provider did not complete this sign-in. Try again.
external_auth_account_recovery_desc: This external sign-in attempt could not be matched to a local account automatically. Sign in to an existing account to link it, or continue with email verification if you do not have a local account.
external_auth_email_verification_desc: Enter your email and AsterDrive will continue with its own verification email.
external_auth_email_verification_hint: Sign in to an existing AsterDrive account first to link this external identity. Use email verification only when creating an account or confirming ownership of a local email address.
external_auth_email_verification_sent_hi: Open the link in the email to finish signing in. You can close this page.
external_auth_email_verification_sent_to: Verification email sent. Check your inbox.
external_auth_email_verification_missing: This external auth email verification link does not contain a usable token.
external_auth_email_verification_invalid: This external auth email verification link is invalid or has already been used. Start external sign-in again.
external_auth_email_verification_expired: This external auth email verification link has expired. Start external sign-in again.
verify_contact_expired_desc: This link has expired. To activate your account, resend the activation email from the sign-in page. To confirm an email change, resend the confirmation from security settings.
verify_contact_invalid_desc: This link may be invalid, already used, or replaced by a newer email. To activate your account, resend the activation email from the sign-in page. To confirm an email change, resend the confirmation from security settings.
verify_contact_missing_token_desc: This link does not contain a usable verification token, so there is nothing to confirm.
verify_contact_email_changed_login_hint: Email changed to {{email}}. Sign in with the new address.
invitation_accepted_login: Invitation accepted. Sign in with your new account.
